name: Carnivore NY Strip Steak Dinner
instructions: Season steak heavily with salt and pepper. Sear in cast iron 4 min per side for medium-rare. Rest 5 min. Serve with broth as au jus.

name: Carnivore Lamb Rack Dinner Plate
instructions: Season lamb rack with salt and pepper. Sear fat-side down 3 min; transfer to 400°F oven for 12-15 min until internal temp 135°F. Rest 5 min.

name: Carnivore Pork Chop Dinner
instructions: Season pork chop. Sear 5 min per side in hot skillet. Remove; add cream to pan and reduce 2 min. Serve chop with cream sauce.

name: Carnivore Ground Beef Dinner Bowl
instructions: Brown ground beef in a pan; season with salt and pepper. Push to one side; fry eggs in rendered fat. Top with melted cheddar. Serve in bowl.

name: Carnivore Beef Liver Bacon Dinner
instructions: Cook bacon until crisp; remove. In bacon fat, cook sliced liver 3 min per side. Deglaze with broth. Serve liver topped with bacon.

name: Carnivore Turkey Breast Dinner
instructions: Season turkey breast generously. Sear all sides in hot pan; add broth and bake at 375°F for 25-30 min until internal temp 165°F. Rest 5 min, slice.

name: Carnivore Ribeye with Bone Broth
instructions: Season ribeye. Sear 4 min per side in very hot cast iron. Rest 5 min. Warm beef broth and serve alongside for sipping.

name: Carnivore Shrimp Cream Dinner
instructions: Cook shrimp in hot pan 1-2 min per side until pink. Add heavy cream; simmer 3 min to make sauce. Season with salt and pepper.

name: Carnivore Halibut Dinner
instructions: Season halibut. Pan-sear 5 min per side until golden and cooked through. Drizzle cream over fish in last minute of cooking. Serve immediately.

name: Carnivore Ground Lamb Dinner Bowl
instructions: Mince lamb; combine with ground beef, salt, pepper. Form into thick patties. Cook in hot dry pan 4 min per side for medium. Serve in bowl.

name: Carnivore Pork Tenderloin Dinner
instructions: Season pork. Sear all sides in hot pan; roast at 400°F for 20 min until internal 145°F. Rest, slice. Reduce cream in pan for sauce.

name: Carnivore Sirloin Ground Beef Mix
instructions: Form ground beef into 2 patties; cook 4 min per side. Sear sirloin 3 min per side. Serve both on plate with broth drizzle.

name: Carnivore Salmon Butter Dinner
instructions: Season salmon. Sear skin-side down 5 min; flip and cook 3 min. Drizzle with cream in last minute. Serve immediately.

name: Keto Chicken Parmesan Style

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Pound chicken thin; season and pan-sear in olive oil 4 min per side. Top with tomato, mozzarella, and parmesan. Bake at 375°F for 12 min until cheese is bubbly.

name: Keto Beef Zucchini Lasagna
instructions: Slice zucchini lengthwise into strips. Brown beef with Italian seasoning. Layer in baking dish: zucchini, beef, ricotta, diced tomato, mozzarella. Bake at 375°F for 35 min.

name: Keto Shrimp Scampi Zucchini Noodles
instructions: Spiralize zucchini. Cook shrimp in olive oil with garlic 2 min per side. Add zucchini noodles; toss 2 min. Finish with lemon juice, salt, and pepper.

name: Keto Lamb Cauliflower Mash Plate
instructions: Steam cauliflower until tender; blend with cream, salt, and olive oil for mash. Season lamb with rosemary and salt; sear 3-4 min per side. Serve over cauli mash.

name: Keto Salmon Avocado Cream Dinner
instructions: Sear salmon skin-side down 5 min; flip and cook 3 min. Blend avocado, cream, lemon, garlic for sauce. Serve salmon over avocado cream.

name: Keto Turkey Stuffed Bell Pepper
instructions: Halve and hollow peppers. Brown turkey with onion, Italian seasoning; stir in diced tomato. Fill peppers, top with cheddar. Bake at 375°F for 25 min.

name: Keto Beef Cauliflower Stew
instructions: Brown beef with onion and garlic. Add cauliflower florets, tomatoes, and broth. Simmer covered 20 min until cauliflower is tender. Season and serve.

name: Keto Cod Parmesan Crust Dinner
instructions: Mix parmesan and almond flour. Press onto top of cod fillets. Bake at 400°F for 15 min until crust is golden and fish flakes easily.

name: Keto Chicken Thigh Asparagus Plate

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Season chicken; roast at 400°F for 25-30 min until golden. Toss asparagus with oil and garlic; roast last 12 min. Squeeze lemon over everything. Serve together.

name: Keto Mozzarella Stuffed Meatballs
instructions: Mix beef, egg, almond flour, Italian seasoning, salt. Form balls stuffed with mozzarella cube. Bake at 400°F for 20 min until browned and cooked through.

name: Keto Pork Tenderloin Cream Sauce
instructions: Season pork with rosemary, salt, pepper. Sear all sides; roast at 400°F 20 min. Rest and slice. Deglaze pan with cream and garlic; reduce 3 min. Serve sauce over pork.

name: Keto Halibut Herb Butter Dinner
instructions: Marinate halibut in olive oil, lemon, garlic, rosemary 10 min. Pan-sear 4-5 min per side until golden. Serve with pan drippings.

name: Vegan Tempeh Broccoli Stir Fry
instructions: Cube tempeh; stir-fry in sesame oil 5 min. Add broccoli, garlic, ginger; cook 4 min. Add soy sauce; toss until coated. Serve over brown rice.

name: Vegan Lentil Walnut Bolognese
instructions: Pulse walnuts coarsely. Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil 4 min. Add lentils, walnuts, tomatoes, and Italian seasoning; simmer 20 min. Serve over spiralized zucchini or brown rice.

name: Vegan Black Bean Enchilada Bowl
instructions: Sauté peppers in olive oil 4 min. Add black beans, tomatoes, cumin, and salt; simmer 10 min. Serve over brown rice.

name: Vegan Tofu Tikka Masala
instructions: Cube and bake tofu at 400°F 20 min. Sauté onion, garlic, ginger in olive oil 4 min. Add tomatoes, coconut milk, cumin; simmer 15 min. Add tofu; simmer 5 min. Serve with brown rice.

name: Vegan Chickpea Eggplant Stew
instructions: Cube eggplant; sauté in olive oil with onion and garlic 6 min. Add chickpeas, tomatoes, cumin, and 200ml water. Simmer 20 min until thick. Serve over quinoa.

name: Vegan Tempeh Thai Peanut Bowl
instructions: Cube tempeh; bake at 400°F 20 min. Steam broccoli 4 min. Whisk peanut butter, soy sauce, ginger, sesame oil for sauce. Toss all with sauce; serve over brown rice.

name: Vegan Lentil Shepherds Pie
instructions: Roast mashed sweet potato with salt for topping. Sauté onion, carrot in oil 5 min; add lentils, cumin, 200ml water; simmer 10 min. Pour into baking dish; top with mashed sweet potato. Bake 400°F 20 min.

name: Vegan Black Bean Quinoa Chili
instructions: Sauté onion and pepper in olive oil 4 min. Add black beans, tomatoes, cumin, and quinoa. Simmer 15 min until flavors meld. Season and serve.

name: Vegan Tofu Mushroom Stir Fry
instructions: Cube tofu; pan-fry in sesame oil until golden 6 min. Add sliced mushrooms, garlic, ginger; cook 4 min. Add soy sauce; toss. Serve over brown rice.

name: Vegan Chickpea Spinach Coconut Curry
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil 4 min. Add tomatoes, coconut milk, cumin; simmer 8 min. Add chickpeas; simmer 10 min. Stir in spinach until wilted. Serve with brown rice.

name: Vegan Edamame Tofu Rice Bowl
instructions: Pan-fry tofu in sesame oil until golden. Add edamame and soy sauce; toss. Serve over brown rice with grated ginger.

name: Vegan Lentil Sweet Potato Soup
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil 3 min. Add cubed sweet potato, lentils, 600ml water, cumin, and salt. Simmer 20 min until sweet potato is tender. Blend partially.

name: Vegan Tempeh Buddha Bowl Tahini
instructions: Bake tempeh slices at 400°F 20 min until crispy. Massage kale with sesame oil. Whisk tahini with lemon for dressing. Bowl: quinoa, kale, sliced carrot, tempeh; drizzle dressing.

name: Pescatarian Baked Halibut Tomato Dinner
instructions: Place halibut in baking dish. Top with diced tomatoes, garlic, Italian seasoning, olive oil, and lemon. Bake at 400°F for 18-20 min until fish flakes.

name: Pescatarian Shrimp Stir Fry Brown Rice
instructions: Stir-fry shrimp in sesame oil with garlic and ginger 2-3 min. Add broccoli; cook 4 min. Add soy sauce; toss. Serve over brown rice.

name: Pescatarian Salmon Herb Quinoa Dinner
instructions: Roast asparagus with oil and garlic at 400°F 12 min. Season salmon; bake at 400°F 15 min. Serve over quinoa with lemon squeeze.

name: Pescatarian Cod Lemon Asparagus
instructions: Toss asparagus with oil and garlic; roast at 400°F 12 min. Season cod with salt; bake on same sheet for last 12 min. Squeeze lemon over everything.

name: Pescatarian Tilapia Sweet Potato Dinner
instructions: Cube sweet potato; roast with oil, paprika, salt at 400°F 20 min. Season tilapia; bake at same temp last 12 min. Steam broccoli. Serve together.

name: Pescatarian Mahi Mahi Coconut Curry
instructions: Sauté onion, garlic, ginger in olive oil 4 min. Add tomatoes, coconut milk, cumin; simmer 10 min. Add mahi mahi chunks; cook 8 min until fish is cooked through. Serve with brown rice.

name: Pescatarian Tuna Zucchini Noodle Bowl
instructions: Spiralize zucchini; sauté in olive oil with garlic 3 min. Top with tuna and sliced avocado. Drizzle with lemon juice and season.

name: Pescatarian Salmon Spinach Quinoa Bake
instructions: Toss quinoa with olive oil, garlic, salt. Spread in baking dish. Top with spinach and salmon fillets. Drizzle with lemon. Bake at 400°F for 20 min.

name: Pescatarian Shrimp Black Bean Rice Bowl
instructions: Cook shrimp in olive oil with cumin 2 min per side. Warm black beans. Bowl: rice base with black beans, shrimp, avocado, and salsa.

name: Pescatarian Halibut Kale Lemon Plate
instructions: Massage kale with olive oil and lemon. Season halibut; pan-sear 4-5 min per side. Serve fish over kale; drizzle with pan juices and extra lemon.

name: Pescatarian Tilapia Avocado Mango Salsa
instructions: Season tilapia; bake at 400°F 12 min. Dice avocado and mango; toss with lemon juice and salt for salsa. Serve fish topped with salsa.

name: Pescatarian Cod Sweet Potato Fishcake Bowl
instructions: Bake cod at 400°F 12 min; flake. Roast diced sweet potato with oil, paprika, salt 20 min. Mix cod and sweet potato; form into cakes; pan-fry in olive oil 3 min per side.

name: Pescatarian Shrimp Broccoli Garlic Rice
instructions: Roast broccoli with oil, garlic, salt at 400°F 15 min. Cook shrimp in olive oil with garlic 2 min per side. Serve shrimp and broccoli over brown rice with lemon.

name: Paleo Chicken Breast Roasted Beets

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Roast sliced beets at 400°F 25 min. Season chicken; pan-cook 6 min per side. Rest, slice. Arrange over greens with beets; drizzle with olive oil and balsamic.

name: Paleo Ground Beef Sweet Potato Shepherd Pie
instructions: Roast and mash sweet potato. Sauté onion, carrot in oil 5 min; add beef and cook 6 min; season. Pour into baking dish; top with mashed sweet potato. Bake at 400°F 20 min.

name: Paleo Pork Tenderloin with Apple
instructions: Season pork; sear all sides in olive oil. Roast at 400°F 20 min. Meanwhile, sauté sliced apples and onions with cinnamon until soft. Rest pork; slice and serve with apple mixture.

name: Paleo Salmon with Mango Avocado Salsa
instructions: Dice avocado and mango; toss with lemon juice for salsa. Season salmon; sear skin-side down 5 min; flip and cook 3 min. Serve topped with salsa.

name: Paleo Turkey Meatball Veggie Bowl
instructions: Mix turkey with Italian seasoning and salt; form meatballs. Brown in olive oil 4 min. Add diced tomato and zucchini; simmer 15 min. Serve meatballs with vegetable sauce.

name: Paleo Lamb Stew Root Vegetables
instructions: Cube and brown lamb in olive oil 5 min. Add carrots, diced sweet potato, onion, rosemary, and broth. Simmer covered 30 min until lamb and veg are tender.

name: Paleo Beef Butternut Squash Curry
instructions: Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil 4 min. Add beef; cook 5 min. Add cubed squash, coconut milk, cumin; simmer 20 min until squash is tender.

name: Paleo Shrimp Asparagus Stir Fry
instructions: Toss asparagus with half the oil and garlic; roast at 400°F 10 min. Cook shrimp in remaining oil with garlic 2 min per side. Combine; drizzle with lemon.

name: Paleo Chicken Kale Sweet Potato Bowl

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Dice and roast sweet potato at 400°F 20 min. Pan-cook chicken 6 min per side; slice. Massage kale with olive oil and lemon. Assemble bowl with all components.

name: Paleo Ground Turkey Vegetable Skillet
instructions: Cook ground turkey in olive oil with onion and cumin until browned. Add diced zucchini and pepper; cook 5 more min until tender. Season and serve.

name: Mediterranean Lemon Herb Chicken

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Marinate chicken in lemon, garlic, olive oil, Italian seasoning for 30 min. Pan-sear 7 min per side or bake at 400°F for 25 min until golden and cooked through.

name: Mediterranean Baked Salmon Capers
instructions: Arrange salmon in baking dish. Scatter cherry tomatoes and garlic. Drizzle with olive oil and lemon; season with Italian seasoning and salt. Bake at 400°F for 18-20 min.

name: Mediterranean Eggplant Lentil Stew
instructions: Cube eggplant and salt it; let drain 10 min. Sauté onion and garlic in olive oil 4 min. Add eggplant; cook 5 min. Add lentils, tomatoes, cumin; simmer 20 min.

name: Mediterranean Cod Tomato Caper Sauce
instructions: Sauté garlic in olive oil 1 min. Add tomatoes and Italian seasoning; simmer 8 min. Add cod; cover and cook 10 min until fish flakes. Finish with lemon juice.

name: Mediterranean Chicken Vegetable Bake

ingredients.item: chicken breast, broilers or fryers, raw

instructions: Toss chicken and vegetables with olive oil, garlic, Italian seasoning. Spread in baking dish. Bake at 400°F for 30-35 min until chicken is cooked and vegetables are tender.

name: Mediterranean Shrimp Quinoa Skillet
instructions: Cook shrimp in olive oil with garlic 2 min per side. Add cherry tomatoes; cook 2 min. Add cooked quinoa and spinach; toss until spinach wilts. Finish with lemon.

name: Mediterranean Lamb Vegetable Tagine
instructions: Brown lamb in olive oil with onion 5 min. Add zucchini, carrots, tomatoes, cumin, and 200ml water. Simmer covered 30 min until lamb is tender.

name: Mediterranean Tofu Roasted Vegetable Bowl
instructions: Cube tofu and vegetables; toss with olive oil, Italian seasoning, salt. Spread on sheet pan. Roast at 400°F for 30 min, tossing halfway. Serve over quinoa with lemon.

name: Vegan Almond Date Protein Balls
instructions: Blend almonds, almond butter, protein powder, chia seeds, cinnamon, and coconut oil until combined. Roll into 12 balls. Refrigerate 30 min until firm.

name: Vegan Hemp Seed Cocoa Bites
instructions: Mix hemp seeds, cocoa powder, almond butter, maple syrup, vanilla, and coconut oil. Press into small silicone molds or roll into balls. Freeze 20 min.

name: Vegan Edamame with Sea Salt
instructions: Steam edamame until tender and bright green. Drizzle with sesame oil; toss with sea salt. Serve warm or at room temperature.

name: Vegan Chia Berry Pudding
instructions: Stir chia seeds, coconut milk, maple syrup, and vanilla together. Refrigerate 4 hours or overnight. Top with fresh blueberries before serving.

name: Vegan Peanut Butter Apple Slices
instructions: Core and slice apple into wedges. Spread each slice with peanut butter. Sprinkle with chia seeds and cinnamon. Serve immediately.

name: Vegan Cashew Berry Smoothie
instructions: Blend cashews, blueberries, banana, protein powder, and coconut milk until smooth. Pour and serve immediately.

name: Vegan Black Bean Hummus Veggies
instructions: Blend black beans with hummus, lemon, cumin for dip. Slice carrots and cucumber into sticks. Serve with black bean hummus.

name: Vegan Coconut Almond Energy Bar
instructions: Blend almonds; mix with all ingredients until combined. Press into lined baking pan. Refrigerate 2 hours until firm. Cut into bars.

name: Carnivore Beef Jerky Bowl
instructions: Slice sirloin paper-thin against the grain. Toss with salt and pepper. Dehydrate at 165°F for 4-6 hours or bake at lowest oven setting 3-4 hours until dry and chewy.

name: Carnivore Smoked Salmon Bites
instructions: Spread cream cheese on thin smoked salmon slices. Roll into bite-size pieces. Season lightly and serve chilled.

name: Carnivore Hard Boiled Eggs and Bacon
instructions: Peel and halve hard-boiled eggs. Cook bacon until crisp. Serve eggs alongside crumbled bacon with a pinch of sea salt.

name: Carnivore Ground Beef Snack Patties
instructions: Season ground beef with salt and pepper. Form into 4 mini patties. Cook in a hot pan 3 min per side. Serve warm as snack patties.

name: Carnivore Pork Rind Cream Cheese Snack
instructions: Cook thin pork slices until crispy. Serve topped with cream cheese and a pinch of salt and pepper.

name: Carnivore Ground Turkey Snack Bites
instructions: Mix ground turkey with salt and pepper; roll into balls. Bake at 400°F for 15 min until cooked through. Serve warm.

name: Keto Cheese Almond Snack Plate
instructions: Slice cheddar cheese. Arrange on plate with almonds and cucumber rounds. Season lightly with salt.

name: Keto Avocado Cream Cheese Bites
instructions: Halve avocado and remove pit. Fill each half with cream cheese. Season with salt, pepper, and lemon juice.

name: Keto Salmon Cucumber Rounds
instructions: Slice cucumber into thick rounds. Top each with a dollop of cream cheese and a piece of smoked salmon. Season with salt.

name: Keto Cheddar Egg Snack Puffs
instructions: Whisk eggs with shredded cheddar, salt, and pepper. Pour into greased muffin tin (half full). Bake at 375°F for 12 min until puffed and golden.

name: Keto Pumpkin Seed Parmesan Mix
instructions: Toss pumpkin seeds with grated parmesan, salt, and paprika. Spread on baking sheet. Toast at 350°F for 8-10 min until golden.

name: Keto Turkey Cream Cheese Rolls
instructions: Lay turkey slices flat; spread cream cheese and add cucumber strips. Roll up tightly. Cut into bite-size pieces.

name: Keto Almond Butter Celery Sticks
instructions: Slice celery into sticks. Fill the hollow of each stick with almond butter. Sprinkle with sea salt and serve.

name: Keto Cottage Cheese Flaxseed Bowl
instructions: Scoop cottage cheese into bowl. Top with ground flaxseed, walnuts, and cinnamon. Stir gently and serve chilled.

name: Whey Protein Berry Shake
instructions: Blend whey protein, blueberries, banana, and milk until smooth. Top with chia seeds.

name: Cottage Cheese with Strawberries Hemp
instructions: Spoon cottage cheese into bowl. Top with sliced strawberries and hemp seeds. Drizzle with honey.

name: Greek Yogurt Almond Protein Bowl
instructions: Spoon yogurt into bowl. Top with almonds, blueberries, honey drizzle, and cinnamon.

name: Tuna Cucumber Bites
instructions: Drain tuna; mix with Dijon mustard, lemon juice, and salt. Slice cucumber into thick rounds. Top each round with tuna salad.

name: Turkey Hummus Rollup Snack
instructions: Lay turkey slices on flat surface. Spread hummus on each slice. Add cucumber strip and spinach leaf. Roll up tightly.

name: Egg White Avocado Snack
instructions: Peel and slice eggs. Mash avocado with lemon, salt, and pepper. Arrange eggs alongside avocado mash.

name: Paleo Mango Coconut Bites
instructions: Blend mango and coconut milk. Stir in chia seeds, hemp seeds, and cinnamon. Pour into molds or a container. Freeze 2 hours until firm.

name: Paleo Apple Almond Butter Bowl
instructions: Core and chop apple into cubes. Drizzle almond butter over apple. Scatter walnuts and dust with cinnamon.

name: Paleo Banana Walnut Snack
instructions: Slice banana and arrange in bowl. Top with walnuts, drizzle almond butter, and dust with cinnamon.

name: Paleo Pumpkin Seed Hemp Mix
instructions: Toss pumpkin seeds, hemp seeds, and almonds with sea salt and cinnamon. Toast in a dry pan 3 minutes. Serve as trail mix.
